subject: current-affairs
description: Pakistan National Current Affairs 2025 MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: On _____, 2025, Pakistan began its term as a non-permanent member of the UNSC for the years 2025–2026.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan formally took its UNSC non-permanent seat on 1 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 1, the Pakistan Bureau of Statistics initiated field operations for the country's _____ Agricultural Census.
mcqs.explanation: The PBS launched the 7th Agricultural Census on 1 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 2, the federal government declared _____ a strategic institution.
mcqs.explanation: On 2 January 2025, Pakistan Broadcasting Corporation (PBC) was declared a strategic institution.

mcqs.q: On _____, Elon Musk's satellite-based internet company 'Starlink' got registered in Pakistan.
mcqs.explanation: Starlink was officially registered in Pakistan on 4 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 7, the _____ removed Pakistan from the list of 'hunger hotspots'.
mcqs.explanation: On 7 January 2025, UNDP removed Pakistan from its list of global hunger hotspots.

mcqs.q: On Jan 9, Pakistan appointed Air Marshal (R) Muhammad Mugees Afzal as its new envoy to:
mcqs.explanation: Air Marshal (R) Muhammad Mugees Afzal was appointed as Pakistan's Ambassador to Türkiye.

mcqs.q: The current Director General of the National Counter-Terrorism Authority (NACTA) is:
mcqs.explanation: Kashif Zaman is the Director General of NACTA.

mcqs.q: On Jan 10, PIA resumed its flight operations to Europe, with its first flight from Islamabad to:
mcqs.explanation: PIA's first European flight after the resumption was Islamabad to Paris on 10 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 11, the first-ever historic governors' summit was convened at the Governor House in:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's first-ever governors' summit was convened in Karachi on 11 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 12, the federal government announced the opening of the _____ official border crossing point between Pakistan and Iran at Kohak Cheedgi area of Panjgur.
mcqs.explanation: Kohak Cheedgi became the fifth official Pakistan-Iran border crossing point.

mcqs.q: On Jan 14, the _____ cabinet fixed the speed limit for motorcyclists to 60 km/h across the province.
mcqs.explanation: The Punjab cabinet fixed motorcyclist speed limit at 60 km/h province-wide on 14 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 14, Pakistan and _____ signed a protocol to explore ways to strengthen bilateral economic cooperation.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and Iraq signed an economic cooperation protocol on 14 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 20, the New Gwadar International Airport became operational with the arrival of the first flight from:
mcqs.explanation: The first commercial flight to land at the new Gwadar International Airport came from Karachi.

mcqs.q: The current federal minister for Science and Technology is:
mcqs.explanation: Khalid Maqbool Siddiqui (MQM-P) is the federal Minister for Science and Technology.

mcqs.q: On Jan 21, _____ won the 32nd National Shooting Championship.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan Navy won the 32nd National Shooting Championship in January 2025.

mcqs.q: The India North Europe Express (INX) maritime service connecting Pakistan to Europe was launched on:
mcqs.explanation: The INX direct shipping line was launched on 22 January 2025.

mcqs.q: The current Managing Director of the Overseas Pakistanis Foundation is:
mcqs.explanation: Afzaal Bhatti is the MD of the Overseas Pakistanis Foundation (OPF).

mcqs.q: The Overseas Pakistanis Foundation was established under the Emigration Ordinance of:
mcqs.explanation: OPF was established under the Emigration Ordinance, 1979.

mcqs.q: On Jan 23, the Pakistan Navy assumed the command of Multinational Combined Task Force 151 from the _____ Navy.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan Navy took command of CTF-151 from the Turkish Navy on 23 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 24, _____ was elected chairman of the National Assembly's Public Accounts Committee.
mcqs.explanation: Junaid Akbar was elected chairman of the NA's Public Accounts Committee on 24 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 27, President Zardari appointed 12 additional judges of the _____ High Court.
mcqs.explanation: President Zardari appointed 12 additional judges to the Sindh High Court on 27 January 2025.

mcqs.q: The current chief executive of the Trade Development Authority of Pakistan (TDAP) is:
mcqs.explanation: Faiz Ahmad is the chief executive of TDAP.

mcqs.q: A 22-year-old Pakistani entrepreneur awarded the BRICS and SCO Social Entrepreneur of the Year 2025 award is:
mcqs.explanation: Saad Siddiqui received the BRICS and SCO Social Entrepreneur of the Year 2025 award.

mcqs.q: President Zardari signed the Prevention of Electronic Crimes (Amendment) (PECA) Bill, 2025, into law on:
mcqs.explanation: PECA Amendment 2025 received presidential assent on 29 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Jan 29, _____ was appointed chairperson of the Pakistan Red Crescent Society.
mcqs.explanation: Farzhana Naek was appointed Chairperson of the Pakistan Red Crescent Society.

mcqs.q: On Jan 30, KP's new Inspector General of Police, _____, assumed the charge of his office.
mcqs.explanation: Zulfiqar Hameed assumed charge as IG Police Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on 30 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 1, three judges from different high courts were assigned to the _____ High Court.
mcqs.explanation: Three judges were transferred to the Islamabad High Court on 1 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 2, PMDC increased the pass mark of the annual MBBS and BDS examinations from 50% to:
mcqs.explanation: PMDC raised the MBBS/BDS pass mark to 70% on 2 February 2025.

mcqs.q: Agricultural income became taxable across Pakistan on:
mcqs.explanation: Agricultural income became taxable across the country from 4 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 4, the _____ High Court Chief Justice inaugurated the first dedicated Inheritance Court.
mcqs.explanation: The Peshawar High Court inaugurated Pakistan's first dedicated Inheritance Court on 4 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On _____, the 9th Multinational Maritime Exercise AMAN 2025 kicked off in Karachi.
mcqs.explanation: AMAN 2025, the 9th edition of the multinational maritime exercise, began in Karachi on 7 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 7, the Aviation Division was merged with the Ministry of:
mcqs.explanation: The Aviation Division was merged into the Ministry of Defence on 7 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 7, the SAFRON Division was merged with the Ministry of:
mcqs.explanation: The SAFRON (States and Frontier Regions) Division was merged with the Ministry of Kashmir Affairs.

mcqs.q: Transparency International's latest Corruption Perception Index ranked Pakistan at _____ out of 180 countries.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan was ranked 135th out of 180 countries in the 2024 CPI released in early 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 12, Pakistan cricket great _____ was inducted posthumously into the PCB Hall of Fame.
mcqs.explanation: Hanif Mohammad — 'Little Master' — was posthumously inducted into the PCB Hall of Fame on 12 February 2025.

mcqs.q: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan reached Islamabad on a two-day official visit on:
mcqs.explanation: President Erdogan arrived in Islamabad on 12 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 12, the Azerbaijan-Pakistan Chamber of Commerce and Industry was inaugurated in:
mcqs.explanation: The Azerbaijan-Pakistan Chamber of Commerce and Industry was inaugurated in Islamabad.

mcqs.q: On Feb 13, Faisal Nisar Chaudhry was appointed as _____ of Utility Stores Corporation.
mcqs.explanation: Faisal Nisar Chaudhry was appointed Managing Director (MD) of USC on 13 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 13, Shahab Ali Shah was appointed Chief Secretary of:
mcqs.explanation: Shahab Ali Shah was appointed Chief Secretary of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

mcqs.q: On _____, CJP Yahya Afridi administered the oath of office to six newly appointed judges of the apex court.
mcqs.explanation: CJP Yahya Afridi administered oath to six new SC judges on 14 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 15, COAS General Asim Munir and CM Punjab launched the Green Pakistan Initiative in:
mcqs.explanation: The Green Pakistan Initiative was launched in Cholistan on 15 February 2025.

mcqs.q: 'Five Thousand Years of Pakistan: An Archaeological Outline' was written by:
mcqs.explanation: Sir Mortimer Wheeler authored 'Five Thousand Years of Pakistan: An Archaeological Outline'.

mcqs.q: Pakistan Ordnance Factories (POF) was established in:
mcqs.explanation: POF Wah was established in 1951.

mcqs.q: On Feb 16, the _____ government approved historic land reforms.
mcqs.explanation: The Gilgit-Baltistan government approved historic land reforms on 16 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 18, PM Shehbaz Sharif inaugurated the Recep Tayyip Erdogan Interchange in:
mcqs.explanation: The Recep Tayyip Erdogan Interchange was inaugurated by PM Shehbaz in Islamabad.

mcqs.q: On Feb 18, _____ Police appointed Shoaib Khan Zehri (WBC World Title holder in Asia) as goodwill ambassador.
mcqs.explanation: Balochistan Police appointed boxer Shoaib Khan Zehri as its goodwill ambassador.

mcqs.q: On Feb 19, _____ was appointed IG Pakistan Railways Police.
mcqs.explanation: Tahir Rai was appointed Inspector General Pakistan Railways Police.

mcqs.q: The current Chairman OGRA is:
mcqs.explanation: Masroor Khan is the Chairman of the Oil and Gas Regulatory Authority (OGRA).

mcqs.q: On Feb 21, the KP Public Service Commission increased the age limit for PMS exams from _____ years.
mcqs.explanation: KPPSC raised the PMS age limit from 30 to 35 years on 21 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 24, Pakistan and _____ agreed to expand bilateral trade volume and promote joint defence production.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and Azerbaijan signed a defence-and-trade expansion agreement on 24 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On Feb 25, Pakistan and _____ launched direct government-to-government trade for the first time in decades.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan-Bangladesh direct G2G trade was relaunched on 25 February 2025 after decades.

mcqs.q: On Feb 25, Pakistan and _____ signed an MoU aimed at increasing bilateral trade volume to $10 billion.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and Iran signed an MoU on 25 February 2025 targeting $10 billion bilateral trade.

mcqs.q: On Feb 26, _____ was elected as Member of the Judicial Commission of Pakistan for two years.
mcqs.explanation: Ahsan Bhoon was elected as a member of the Judicial Commission of Pakistan for a two-year term.

mcqs.q: On Feb 26, _____ approved the establishment of its first Crime Control Department to curb organised crime.
mcqs.explanation: The Punjab government approved the establishment of its first Crime Control Department.

mcqs.q: On Feb 27, the Democracy Index reported Pakistan's democracy ranking dropped from 3.25 in _____ to 2.84 in 2024.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's Democracy Index score fell from 3.25 (2023) to 2.84 (2024).

mcqs.q: On Feb 27, Pakistan and _____ signed 5 agreements to enhance cooperation in various fields.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and the UAE signed 5 cooperation agreements on 27 February 2025.

mcqs.q: Darul Uloom Haqqania is located in:
mcqs.explanation: Darul Uloom Haqqania is in Akora Khattak, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

mcqs.q: The Jamiat Ulema-e-Islam (Sami) chief who was killed on Feb 28 was:
mcqs.explanation: Maulana Hamidul Haq, head of JUI-S, was killed on 28 February 2025.

mcqs.q: The committee that forms Constitutional Benches consists of how many members?
mcqs.explanation: The Constitutional Bench formation committee comprises three members.

mcqs.q: On Mar 4, the Punjab government appointed _____ as Advocate General of Punjab.
mcqs.explanation: Amjad Pervaiz was appointed Advocate General Punjab on 4 March 2025.

mcqs.q: The terrorist for whose arrest US President Donald Trump publicly thanked Pakistan is named:
mcqs.explanation: President Trump thanked Pakistan for the arrest of ISIS-K terrorist Sharifullah.

mcqs.q: On Mar 5, the government appointed _____ as Chief Adviser to the Finance Minister on the Pakistan Crypto Council.
mcqs.explanation: Bilal Bin Saqib was appointed Chief Adviser to the Finance Minister on the Pakistan Crypto Council.

mcqs.q: Pakistan ranked _____ in the Global Terrorism Index 2025.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 2nd in the Global Terrorism Index 2025.

mcqs.q: Mumtaz Zahra Baloch is Pakistan's Ambassador to:
mcqs.explanation: Mumtaz Zahra Baloch serves as Pakistan's Ambassador to France.

mcqs.q: On Mar 7, Pakistan was ranked _____ out of 146 countries in the global list of gender equality.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 145th out of 146 countries in the global gender-equality list released on 7 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On Mar 7, UNDP Pakistan and the Government of _____ launched the 'Tailored Intelligence for Actionable Early Warning Systems' project.
mcqs.explanation: UNDP Pakistan and China jointly launched the early-warning systems project on 7 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On Mar 8, _____ extended the repayment period of Pakistan's $2 billion loan by one year.
mcqs.explanation: China extended the repayment period of Pakistan's $2 billion loan by one year on 8 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On Mar 8, Pakistan's _____ was elected as Oxford Union President for Michaelmas Term 2025.
mcqs.explanation: Moosa Harraj was elected Oxford Union President for Michaelmas Term 2025.

mcqs.q: Moosa Harraj is the _____ Pakistani and first from Punjab to be elected Oxford Union President.
mcqs.explanation: Moosa Harraj is the 4th Pakistani — and first from Punjab — to lead the Oxford Union.

mcqs.q: On _____, NADRA announced the launch of Pakistan's first 'dematerialised digital identity card'.
mcqs.explanation: NADRA announced the dematerialised digital ID card on 10 March 2025.

mcqs.q: Armed men attacked the Peshawar-bound Jaffar Express in Bolan district of Balochistan on:
mcqs.explanation: The Jaffar Express was hijacked by militants in Bolan, Balochistan on 11 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On Mar 11, Pakistan ranked _____ in the list of most polluted countries in 2024.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 3rd globally on the most-polluted-countries 2024 list (released 11 March 2025).

mcqs.q: On Mar 11, the SBP approved the amalgamation of Silk Bank with and into the _____ Bank.
mcqs.explanation: The State Bank of Pakistan approved Silk Bank's merger into United Bank Limited (UBL).

mcqs.q: On _____, Google Wallet was officially made available in Pakistan.
mcqs.explanation: Google Wallet officially launched in Pakistan on 12 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On Mar 12, Pakistan's senior _____ set a world record by delivering 59 successful serves in one minute.
mcqs.explanation: Talha Waheed set the world record for most successful serves in a minute (59) on 12 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On _____, the government formally formed the Pakistan Crypto Council.
mcqs.explanation: The Pakistan Crypto Council was formed on 14 March 2025.

mcqs.q: The incumbent president of the All Pakistan Newspapers Society (APNS) is:
mcqs.explanation: Sarmad Ali is the President of the APNS.

mcqs.q: On Mar 15, PM Shehbaz Sharif laid the foundation stone of Daanish University in:
mcqs.explanation: The Daanish University foundation stone was laid in Islamabad on 15 March 2025.

mcqs.q: The National FATF Secretariat is located in:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's National FATF Secretariat is based in Islamabad.

mcqs.q: The Torkham border crossing was reopened after 27 days, following Jirga-level talks between Pakistan and Afghanistan, on:
mcqs.explanation: Torkham reopened on 19 March 2025 after a 27-day closure.

mcqs.q: How long was Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif's official visit to Jeddah for improving bilateral ties?
mcqs.explanation: PM Shehbaz Sharif's official Jeddah visit lasted four days.

mcqs.q: Which two countries agreed to deepen defence cooperation focusing on joint ventures, technology transfer and capacity building?
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and South Africa agreed to deepen defence cooperation in March 2025.

mcqs.q: Which ambassador was honoured at the farewell reception hosted by the Pakistan Mission to the UN on 22 March 2025?
mcqs.explanation: Ambassador Munir Akram, then Pakistan's Permanent Representative to the UN, was honoured at the 22 March farewell.

mcqs.q: On 25 March 2025, the IMF reached a staff-level agreement with Pakistan to unlock how much new funding?
mcqs.explanation: The IMF staff-level agreement on 25 March 2025 unlocked $1.3 billion in new funding for Pakistan.

mcqs.q: Which Pakistani city was featured in a 26 March 2025 travel article for its proximity to the ancient Gandhara civilisation?
mcqs.explanation: Peshawar — close to Taxila and the Gandhara heritage trail — was the focus of the travel feature.

mcqs.q: Pakistan and China discussed which measure to ensure the safety of Chinese nationals in Pakistan?
mcqs.explanation: The two sides discussed the deployment of Chinese security personnel inside Pakistan.

mcqs.q: Which Punjab Police officer was honoured with the Excellence in Performance Award 2025 by the International Association of Women Police on 2 April?
mcqs.explanation: SP Aisha Butt of Punjab Police received the IAWP Excellence in Performance Award 2025.

mcqs.q: Which Pakistani novelist was honoured with the Young Woman of the Year award at the Women Changing the World Awards 2025?
mcqs.explanation: Alishba Khan Barech received the Young Woman of the Year award at the Women Changing the World Awards 2025.

mcqs.q: On 4 April 2025, Pakistan was re-elected to the UN Commission on Narcotic Drugs for a term starting in:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan was re-elected to the UN Commission on Narcotic Drugs for the term starting 2026.

mcqs.q: Four countries accounted for nearly half of the estimated 260,000 maternal deaths worldwide in 2023, per a UN report (7 April). They are:
mcqs.explanation: India, Nigeria, Pakistan and DRC together accounted for almost half of global maternal deaths in 2023.

mcqs.q: On 10 April 2025, PM Shehbaz Sharif arrived in which country for a two-day official visit?
mcqs.explanation: PM Shehbaz Sharif visited Belarus on a two-day official visit starting 10 April 2025.

mcqs.q: How many visas did Pakistan issue to Indian Sikhs for the Baisakhi Festival 2025?
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan issued over 6,500 visas to Indian Sikh pilgrims for Baisakhi 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 16, _____ extended its oil credit facility to Pakistan for an additional two years.
mcqs.explanation: Kuwait extended its oil credit facility to Pakistan by two more years on 16 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 16, _____ launched Pakistan's first-ever Environment Protection Squad.
mcqs.explanation: Punjab launched Pakistan's first Environment Protection Squad on 16 April 2025.

mcqs.q: The former Chief Justice of Pakistan awarded the 2025 Bolch Prize for the Rule of Law is:
mcqs.explanation: Tassaduq Hussain Jillani received the 2025 Bolch Prize for the Rule of Law.

mcqs.q: Tassaduq Hussain Jillani was the _____ Chief Justice of Pakistan.
mcqs.explanation: Tassaduq Hussain Jillani was Pakistan's 21st Chief Justice.

mcqs.q: On April 17, Pakistan and _____ revived high-level talks after a hiatus of 15 years.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and Bangladesh revived high-level Foreign Office Consultations after a 15-year gap.

mcqs.q: On April 17, Member Tariff of NEPRA from _____, Mathar Niaz Rana, tendered his resignation.
mcqs.explanation: Mathar Niaz Rana — NEPRA Member Tariff from Balochistan — resigned on 17 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 20, Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi announced that _____ citizens can now enter Pakistan without restrictions.
mcqs.explanation: Saudi citizens were granted unrestricted entry into Pakistan from 20 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 21, Pakistan and _____ signed two agreements and an MoU aimed at strengthening bilateral relations.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and the UAE signed 2 agreements and 1 MoU on 21 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 29, _____ was appointed CEO of the Pakistan National Shipping Corporation (PNSC).
mcqs.explanation: Jarrar Kazmi was appointed CEO of PNSC on 29 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 29, Supreme Court judge _____ was awarded an honorary doctorate by the University of London.
mcqs.explanation: Justice Ayesha Malik received an honorary doctorate from the University of London on 29 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On April 30, the federal government gave the additional charge of National Security Adviser to:
mcqs.explanation: Lt Gen Asim Malik was given the additional charge of National Security Adviser on 30 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On _____, the National Commission on the Rights of Child launched its first-ever State of Children in Pakistan Report 2024.
mcqs.explanation: NCRC launched the State of Children in Pakistan Report 2024 on 30 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 1, Pakistan was ranked _____ out of 158 countries in the Illicit Trade Index 2025.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 101 out of 158 countries on the Illicit Trade Index 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 2, Pakistan was ranked _____ out of 180 countries in the 2025 World Press Freedom Index.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 158/180 in the 2025 World Press Freedom Index.

mcqs.q: On May 3, Pakistan conducted a successful training launch of the Abdali Weapon System with a range of _____ km.
mcqs.explanation: The Abdali Weapon System has a range of 450 km.

mcqs.q: The Pakistan Air Force shot down India's France-made Rafale jet on:
mcqs.explanation: PAF shot down an Indian Rafale on 6 May 2025 during the Pakistan-India crisis.

mcqs.q: On May 7, the Supreme Court allowed trials of May 9 suspects in military courts after restoring the clauses of Army Act of:
mcqs.explanation: The Supreme Court restored relevant clauses of the Pakistan Army Act, 1952 on 7 May 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 10, Pakistan, _____ and Afghanistan vowed cooperation on security and economy at a Kabul meeting.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan, China and Afghanistan held a trilateral cooperation meeting in Kabul on 10 May 2025.

mcqs.q: The current Director General of the Pakistan Meteorological Department is:
mcqs.explanation: Mehr Sahibzad Khan is the DG of the Pakistan Meteorological Department.

mcqs.q: On May 13, the _____ government banned the use of newspapers with Quranic verses for packaging.
mcqs.explanation: Punjab banned packaging using newspapers carrying Quranic verses on 13 May 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 14, CM KP announced to divide _____ Division into two separate administrative divisions.
mcqs.explanation: Malakand Division was announced to be split into two divisions on 14 May 2025.

mcqs.q: The total length of Pakistan's coastline is approximately:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's coastline runs about 1,046 km along the Arabian Sea.

mcqs.q: The current Chief Minister of Gilgit-Baltistan is:
mcqs.explanation: Gulbar Khan is the Chief Minister of Gilgit-Baltistan.

mcqs.q: Salal Dam is a run-of-the-river hydropower project located on the _____ River.
mcqs.explanation: Salal Dam is on the Chenab River.

mcqs.q: The Kishanganga dam is built on the Kishanganga River, known in Pakistan as the:
mcqs.explanation: The Kishanganga is called the Neelum River when it enters Pakistan via Azad Jammu & Kashmir.

mcqs.q: When Pakistan's first Constitution was enacted in 1956, _____ became President of Pakistan.
mcqs.explanation: Major General Iskander Mirza became the first President of Pakistan under the 1956 Constitution.

mcqs.q: The total number of articles in the 1973 Constitution of Pakistan is:
mcqs.explanation: The 1973 Constitution of Pakistan contains 280 articles.

mcqs.q: The 1973 Constitution of Pakistan was enforced on:
mcqs.explanation: The 1973 Constitution came into force on 14 August 1973.

mcqs.q: The tunnel near which the hijacking of Jaffar Express took place is:
mcqs.explanation: The Jaffar Express was hijacked near the Mashkaf Tunnel in Bolan district, Balochistan.

mcqs.q: The first female three-star general of the Pakistan Army is:
mcqs.explanation: Lt Gen Nigar Johar is the first woman three-star general of the Pakistan Army.

mcqs.q: K2 — the world's second highest peak — is located in which mountain range?
mcqs.explanation: K2 is the highest peak of the Karakoram range.

mcqs.q: The national bird of Pakistan is:
mcqs.explanation: The Chakor (Chukar partridge) is Pakistan's national bird.

mcqs.q: The national tree of Pakistan is:
mcqs.explanation: The Deodar (Cedrus deodara) is Pakistan's national tree.

mcqs.q: The article of the Constitution of Pakistan that specifies a clean, healthy and sustainable environment as a fundamental right is:
mcqs.explanation: Article 9A guarantees the right to a clean, healthy and sustainable environment.

mcqs.q: The current Chairman of the Senate of Pakistan is:
mcqs.explanation: Syed Yousaf Raza Gilani (PPP) is the current Chairman of the Senate of Pakistan.

mcqs.q: Pakistan's current Ambassador to the United States is:
mcqs.explanation: Rizwan Saeed Sheikh is Pakistan's Ambassador to the United States.

mcqs.q: People across Pakistan observed Youm-e-Tashakur (Day of Gratitude) on _____, to commemorate the success of Operation Bunyan-un-Marsoos.
mcqs.explanation: Youm-e-Tashakur was observed on 16 May 2025.

mcqs.q: Pakistan's recent war with India was named by Pakistan as Marka-e-_____.
mcqs.explanation: The May 2025 war with India was officially named 'Marka-e-Haq' (Battle for Truth).

mcqs.q: On May 18, _____ became the first person from Pakistan to summit all 14 of the world's highest peaks without supplemental oxygen.
mcqs.explanation: Sirbaz Khan became the first Pakistani to summit all fourteen 8,000-metre peaks without supplemental oxygen.

mcqs.q: On May 19, Pakistan received WHO recognition for successfully eliminating _____ as a public-health problem.
mcqs.explanation: WHO recognised Pakistan on 19 May 2025 for eliminating trachoma as a public-health problem.

mcqs.q: The government elevated General Syed Asim Munir to the rank of Field Marshal on:
mcqs.explanation: General Asim Munir was promoted to Field Marshal on 20 May 2025.

mcqs.q: Justice Muhammad Ijaz Swati is the current Chief Justice of the _____ High Court.
mcqs.explanation: Justice Muhammad Ijaz Swati is the Chief Justice of the Balochistan High Court.

mcqs.q: On May 21, Pakistan and China agreed to extend the CPEC to:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and China agreed to extend CPEC to Afghanistan on 21 May 2025.

mcqs.q: The government announced establishing a Pakistan Digital Assets Authority on:
mcqs.explanation: The Pakistan Digital Assets Authority was announced on 21 May 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 22, the Senate unanimously adopted a resolution declaring _____ as Pakistan-Africa Friendship Day.
mcqs.explanation: 25 May was declared Pakistan-Africa Friendship Day by the Senate on 22 May 2025.

mcqs.q: On May 23, CM KP announced district status to Allai tehsil in Battagram district of _____ Division.
mcqs.explanation: Allai tehsil in Battagram (Hazara Division) was elevated to district status.

mcqs.q: The Child Marriage Restraint Bill, 2025 fixes the minimum age for marriage at:
mcqs.explanation: The Child Marriage Restraint Act 2025 sets the legal minimum age of marriage at 18 years.

mcqs.q: On May 28, _____ lifted a 19-year visa ban on Pakistani citizens.
mcqs.explanation: Kuwait lifted its 19-year visa ban on Pakistani citizens on 28 May 2025.

mcqs.q: Pakistan announced its first government-supported Bitcoin reserve on:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan announced its first state-backed Bitcoin reserve on 29 May 2025.

mcqs.q: On June 1, the Global Water Organization officially launched its operations from:
mcqs.explanation: The Global Water Organization launched operations from Riyadh on 1 June 2025.

mcqs.q: The recent Economic Cooperation Organization (ECO) summit was held in:
mcqs.explanation: The ECO summit was held in Tehran in 2025.

mcqs.q: The current Secretary General of the Economic Cooperation Organization (ECO) is:
mcqs.explanation: Asad M. Khan (Pakistan) is the Secretary General of ECO.

mcqs.q: On June 4, Pakistan assumed the chairmanship of the UNSC's 1988 Sanctions Committee, which oversees sanctions targeting:
mcqs.explanation: The UNSC 1988 Sanctions Committee oversees sanctions targeting the Taliban; Pakistan chaired it from 4 June 2025.

mcqs.q: On June 4, _____ was appointed as Chairman Gwadar Port Authority under the Ministry of Maritime Affairs.
mcqs.explanation: Shah Irfan Ahmed was appointed Chairman of the Gwadar Port Authority.

mcqs.q: On June 5, the World Bank increased the poverty threshold for lower-middle-income countries from $3.65 to:
mcqs.explanation: The World Bank revised the lower-middle-income poverty line from $3.65 to $4.20 a day.

mcqs.q: After the World Bank's revision of the poverty threshold, _____ of Pakistan's population now lives below the poverty line.
mcqs.explanation: At $4.20/day, about 44.7% of Pakistanis are below the poverty line.

mcqs.q: On June 5, Justice Sardar Liaqat Hussain was appointed Chief Justice of which High Court?
mcqs.explanation: Justice Sardar Liaqat Hussain became Chief Justice of the AJK High Court on 5 June 2025.

mcqs.q: As per the Pakistan Economic Survey 2024-25, the country's GDP grew by:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's GDP grew by 2.68% in FY 2024-25 per the Economic Survey.

mcqs.q: The total outlay of the Federal Budget 2025-26 is:
mcqs.explanation: The Federal Budget 2025-26 has a total outlay of Rs 17.573 trillion.

mcqs.q: On June 12, Pakistan ranked _____ among 148 countries in the WEF Global Gender Gap Report 2025.
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan ranked 148/148 — last — in the WEF Global Gender Gap Report 2025.

mcqs.q: The Supreme Court has upheld the _____ sentence of Zahir Jaffer in the Noor Mukadam murder case.
mcqs.explanation: The SC upheld the death sentence of Zahir Jaffer in the Noor Mukadam case.

mcqs.q: The Health Services Academy is one of the five Centres of Excellence in Global Public Health Postgraduate Education in the CAREC region. It is located in:
mcqs.explanation: The Health Services Academy is located in Islamabad.

mcqs.q: The Sindh Budget for the next fiscal year has an outlay of:
mcqs.explanation: The Sindh provincial budget 2025-26 has an outlay of Rs 3.45 trillion.

mcqs.q: Pakistan has been elected as a non-permanent member of the UN Security Council for how many times?
Quaid-i-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah presented his 14 Points in March:
mcqs.explanation: Quaid-i-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah presented his historic 14 Points in March 1929.

mcqs.q: The current Special Assistant to the Prime Minister on Blockchain and Cryptocurrency is:
mcqs.explanation: Bilal Bin Saqib serves as SAPM on Blockchain and Cryptocurrency.

mcqs.q: From the Pakistani side, the Indus Waters Treaty of 1960 was signed by:
mcqs.explanation: President Ayub Khan signed the IWT 1960 from the Pakistani side.

mcqs.q: The National Cyber Crimes Investigation Agency was established on 3 May:
mcqs.explanation: The National Cyber Crimes Investigation Agency was established on 3 May 2024.

mcqs.q: Pakistan's current Ambassador to China is:
mcqs.explanation: Khalil Hashmi is Pakistan's Ambassador to China.

mcqs.q: On 16 June, what did the Punjab government unveil for the fiscal year 2025-26?
options: A proposal to reduce provincial spending
A scheme for federal tax reform
mcqs.explanation: Punjab unveiled a Rs 5.33 trillion provincial budget for FY 2025-26 on 16 June 2025.

mcqs.q: According to a global survey by The Economist on 17 June, what position did Karachi hold?
options: Among the top five most liveable cities
Ranked as the most improved city
In the bottom five least liveable cities
mcqs.explanation: Karachi was ranked among the bottom five least liveable cities by The Economist on 17 June 2025.

mcqs.q: How many Pakistani schools were shortlisted for the World's Best School Prizes 2025 (announced 18 June)?
mcqs.explanation: Three Pakistani schools were shortlisted for the World's Best School Prizes 2025.

mcqs.q: PIA resumed its Lahore-Paris flight after a gap of:
mcqs.explanation: PIA's Lahore-Paris service resumed after a five-year gap.

mcqs.q: Naveed Asghar Chaudhry was appointed as Acting Chairman of WAPDA through a notification issued on:
mcqs.explanation: Naveed Asghar Chaudhry was appointed Acting Chairman WAPDA on 21 June 2025.

mcqs.q: Pakistan and the UAE signed an MoU on mutual visa exemption during the 12th JMC session on:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan and the UAE signed the mutual visa exemption MoU on 25 June 2025.

mcqs.q: On 3 July 2025, the Pakistani leader who arrived in Azerbaijan to attend the 17th ECO Summit was:
mcqs.explanation: PM Shehbaz Sharif arrived in Azerbaijan on 3 July 2025 to attend the 17th ECO Summit.
